briefs.title: B.C. Reg. 278/2024 Enacted via Order-in-Council 650/2024 — Details Pending Review
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 278/2024 was enacted through Order-in-Council 650/2024 and published in the B.C. Gazette on December 17, 2024. Full regulatory details require review of the official gazette to determine scope and impact.
briefs.action_required: Review B.C. Reg. 278/2024 in the official B.C. Gazette (No. 18, Dec 17, 2024) to confirm compliance obligations.
